stemHtml: During the descent, when passing through FL340, an aircraft enters the overshooting top of an active tropical convective system with an OAT of -43°C. The pilots notice abnormal total air temperature (TAT) indications and there is the appearance of rain hitting the windscreen even though NO radar returns are shown. What potential icing hazard could be expected in this situation?

options.d: Aerodynamic stall from heavy freezing rain.
